risk_matrix.name: Ricin A-chain

physical_barrier.key_bottleneck: Regulatory (Select Agent) + cell entry (requires B-chain or delivery vehicle)

risk_matrix.interpretation: ProteinMPNN shows moderate functional specificity for Ricin A-chain (FSI=1.10). Physical realizability is MODERATE (Tier 3): Regulatory (Select Agent) + cell entry (requires B-chain or delivery vehicle).

risk_matrix.name: Cholera toxin A1 subunit
risk_matrix.interpretation: ProteinMPNN does not specifically recover Cholera toxin A1 subunit function (FSI=0.22). ESM-2 is highly confident at functional sites (FSPE ratio=0.79). Physical realizability is HIGH (Tier 2): Holotoxin assembly for cell-level toxicity.

risk_matrix.name: Botulinum neurotoxin type A

physical_barrier.key_bottleneck: Size + folding complexity + Tier 1 Select Agent regulation

risk_matrix.interpretation: ProteinMPNN strongly recovers Botulinum neurotoxin type A function from backbone (FSI=2.87). ESM-2 shows moderate confidence at functional sites (FSPE ratio=0.91). Physical realizability is LOW (Tier 4): Size + folding complexity + Tier 1 Select Agent regulation.

risk_matrix.name: Staphylococcal enterotoxin B

physical_barrier.key_bottleneck: Regulatory only — biochemistry is trivially accessible

risk_matrix.interpretation: ProteinMPNN does not specifically recover Staphylococcal enterotoxin B function (FSI=0.70). ESM-2 shows moderate confidence at functional sites (FSPE ratio=0.96). Physical realizability is MODERATE (Tier 3): Regulatory only — biochemistry is trivially accessible.

risk_matrix.name: Abrin A-chain

physical_barrier.key_bottleneck: Regulatory (Select Agent) + cell entry (requires B-chain lectin)

risk_matrix.interpretation: ProteinMPNN shows moderate functional specificity for Abrin A-chain (FSI=1.13). Physical realizability is MODERATE (Tier 3): Regulatory (Select Agent) + cell entry (requires B-chain lectin).

risk_matrix.name: Tetanus toxin light chain

physical_barrier.key_bottleneck: Size + zinc folding + Tier 1 Select Agent regulation

risk_matrix.interpretation: ProteinMPNN strongly recovers Tetanus toxin light chain function from backbone (FSI=1.75). ESM-2 is highly confident at functional sites (FSPE ratio=0.14). Physical realizability is LOW (Tier 4): Size + zinc folding + Tier 1 Select Agent regulation.

risk_matrix.name: Streptolysin O

physical_barrier.key_bottleneck: Oligomerization on cholesterol-containing membranes required for pore function

risk_matrix.interpretation: ProteinMPNN does not specifically recover Streptolysin O function (FSI=0.45). Physical realizability is HIGH (Tier 2): Oligomerization on cholesterol-containing membranes required for pore function.

risk_matrix.name: Anthrax protective antigen
risk_matrix.interpretation: ProteinMPNN never recovers Anthrax protective antigen functional residues (FSI=0.00); these residues are structurally unusual and not constrained by backbone geometry alone. ESM-2 is highly confident at functional sites (FSPE ratio=0.76). Physical realizability is LOW (Tier 4): Multi-component assembly (PA + LF/EF) + heptamerization.
